hero.name: Khyle
hero.description: Passionate computer science student specializing in web and game development. I create engaging digital experiences using C# and .NET technologies, bringing creative ideas to life through code.
about.title: About
about.subtitle: Me
about.description: Get to know more about my journey, passion, and what drives me to create amazing digital experiences
about.story1: I'm a passionate Computer Science student at STI College Marikina, currently pursuing my BSCS degree. My journey in technology began during my senior high school years, where I discovered my love for both web and game development.
about.story2: I thrive on creating engaging digital experiences and solving complex problems through code. My academic excellence, including graduating with honors from junior high school, reflects my dedication to continuous learning and growth in the tech industry.
about.experience_desc: During my work immersion at ECOELEMENTS Inc. as a Data Product Encoder, I gained valuable industry experience in database management and maintaining data accuracy across multiple platforms. This experience taught me the importance of precision and consistency in technology solutions.
skills.title: My
skills.subtitle: Skills
skills.description: A comprehensive overview of my technical expertise and the tools I use to bring ideas to life
projects.title: My
projects.subtitle: Projects
projects.description: A showcase of my latest work in web and game development, demonstrating my skills and passion for creating engaging digital experiences
projects.ingat_desc: A Unity-based visual novel game raising awareness about kidnapping prevention in the Philippines. Features realistic scenarios, interactive storytelling, and decision-based gameplay.
projects.shooting_desc: A challenging shooting gallery game built with MonoGame Framework. Features 4 difficulty modes (Easy to Nightmare), random target spawning, and score tracking.
projects.snake_desc: A classic Snake game implementation demonstrating fundamental game development principles. Features smooth gameplay, score tracking, and collision detection systems built with modern C# practices.
experience.title: Work
experience.subtitle: Experience
experience.description: My professional journey and the valuable experiences that have shaped my career in technology
experience.data_desc: Gained valuable industry experience in database management and data accuracy maintenance across multiple platforms during my work immersion program.
experience.achievement1: Created and maintained accurate product data entries in the company's database system
experience.achievement2: Ensured technical specifications and product attributes were properly cataloged
experience.achievement3: Managed regular updates to product information across multiple platforms
experience.achievement4: Ensured consistency across all digital channels
experience.opportunity_desc: I'm actively seeking internship opportunities and entry-level positions in web development and game development where I can apply my skills and continue growing as a developer.
education.title: My
education.subtitle: Education
education.description: My academic journey and the educational foundation that supports my passion for technology and development
education.goals_desc: Currently focused on mastering programming languages, Game development, and building a strong foundation for a successful career in technology. I'm committed to maintaining academic excellence while gaining practical experience through personal projects.
education.degree1: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science (BSCS)
education.desc1: Currently pursuing my bachelor's degree with a focus on software development, algorithms, and computer programming fundamentals.
education.desc2: Completed senior high school education with a strong foundation in mathematics, science, and early programming concepts.
education.institution3: Missionary Sisters of the Sacred Heart
education.desc3: Graduated with honors, demonstrating academic excellence and strong foundational knowledge across all core subjects.

footer.description: Web & Game Developer passionate about creating engaging digital experiences.
